reason:
Agent attempted to retrieve GitHub username but encountered a proxy error (502 "Failed to fetch access token") when calling the GitHub API. The response does not include a GitHub username as required.
  Bugs found:
    - GitHub API proxy error: The proxy returned a 502 "Failed to fetch access token" error when the agent tried to call the GitHub API on behalf of the connected account. The error message indicates the OAuth token may have expired or been revoked, preventing successful retrieval of the authenticated user's GitHub username.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing multiple agents
Clicked agent "QA-20260505-030253-elx8" in sidebar — Agent page loaded
Verified agent status is "idle" — Status indicator at top right showed "idle" status, satisfying step 3
Clicked message input field and typed "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message was entered in the input field
Clicked Send button — Message was sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", and a new session "GitHub Username Verification Check" was created
Waited for response and GitHub account access request card appeared — Account request card displayed asking to grant GitHub access with a connected GitHub account already selected
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant GitHub account access — Permission was granted, agent continued processing
Allowed GitHub API request for "GET /user" endpoint — Multiple permission dialogs appeared during processing, each was approved with "Allow Once"
Waited up to 4 minutes for response — Agent completed after 2m 49s with status returning to "idle"

Verified response content — Response showed proxy error instead of GitHub username: "The proxy is returning a 502 'Failed to fetch access token' error when trying to call the GitHub API on behalf of the connected account... likely the OAuth token expired or was revoked." The response does NOT include a GitHub username, failing step 7 requirement.
bugs: GitHub API proxy error: The proxy returned a 502 "Failed to fetch access token" error when the agent tried to call the GitHub API on behalf of the connected account. The error message indicates the OAuth token may have expired or been revoked, preventing successful retrieval of the authenticated user's GitHub username.
